w:r.w:t: upload, download, rate, and organize academic PDF documents in a structured, searchable repository.
Allow students and professors to upload, share, and collaborate on academic
Implement advanced filtering by specialization, document type, academic level, and
Monitor downloads, ratings, and popular documents to surface the most valuable
JWT-based user authentication with role-based access control (Student, Moderator,

The application follows a classic client-server architecture where the Express.js backend serves both the REST API and the static frontend files. This single-server approach eliminates CORS issues and simplifies deployment.

The frontend is a Single Page Application (SPA) built with pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. All pages are rendered dynamically within a single index.html file. Navigation is handled by showing/hiding page sections without full page reloads.

between frontend, backend, and database layers.
Full schema with 10 tables, indexes, and

DZ represents a complete, production-ready academic library platform demonstrating mastery of full-stack web development. The project integrates RESTful API design, secure authentication, relational database management, file handling, and a responsive Arabic-first user interface. The modular architecture ensures maintainability and scalability for future
